TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Bob_Anderegg, title = Bob_Anderegg, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Anderegg} }

S.FORM: Bob Anderegg nalecuhan i Monroe, Wisconsin, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Anderegg i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 20, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 8 bulad 24 demiad, 1937 a mihca, Bob Anderegg, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob and…ôr…ôgg nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i monro…ô, wis ¶onsin, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. bob and…ôr…ôgg i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu n…ôw jork kni ¶ks putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, bob and…ôr…ôgg, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Anderegg nalecuhan i Monroe, Wisconsin, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Anderegg i 1959 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 20, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. 8 bulad 24 demiad, 1937 a mihca, Bob Anderegg, miunduay.
